feedback.text: I would like that you include protection for video game if it's not already done because some games if the publisher want can cut the servers and they don't give us a way to make it playable (offline mode, allow private server) It's like I purchase a disk for a movie and the producer 5-10 years later break into my house to steal it and I can't do anything because I didn't read the very long contract I had to accept after I already paid for it
